title: coincya nevadensis subsp. orophila
intro: Coincya nevadensis subsp. orophila, also known as the alpine rockcress, is a subspecies of flowering plant that belongs to the family Brassicaceae. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, containing compounds like glucosinolates and isothiocyanates, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Coincya nevadensis subsp. orophila include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it is often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments, including bronchitis and coughs.
